name: microservices-architecture
description: Starter microservices architecture with main backend, auth service, and blog service.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w main-backend" "npm run dev -w auth-service" "npm run dev -w blog-service" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently "npm run dev -w main-backend" "npm run dev -w auth-service" "npm run dev -w blog-service"
